name: voyagerai-api
description: VoyagerAI — Auth0 for AI Agents demo API. MCP-style endpoints, CIBA, bounded authority, FGA.

scripts._comment_tls: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 is a DEV-ONLY workaround for corp TLS interception (same as AcmeBank API). Node's bundled CAs don't trust the corp-issued cert that curl/macOS keychain do. For prod, set NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS to the corp CA bundle and remove this flag.
